base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tilemap_preview — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Embedded tilemap preview of block/pipe/bush/ground tiles. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Embedded tilemap preview of block/pipe/bush/ground tiles; no animation — included for reference to show which tiles Mario can traverse or land on
